# Industry Presets

Use these presets to accelerate direction setting. They are constraints and heuristics, not canned outputs.

## Fintech / Security / Identity

- Default posture: trust-led
- Common archetypes: proof-led landing, guided utility
- Lean toward: disciplined contrast, stable layout rhythm, explicit states, low ambiguity
- Component priorities: forms, confirmation states, pricing or plan comparison, audit/status surfaces
- Avoid: neon styling, playful critical states, decorative gradients that imply novelty over trust

## B2B SaaS / Devtools / Admin

- Default posture: workflow-led
- Common archetypes: workflow demo, operations surface
- Lean toward: efficient hierarchy, medium-to-high density, filters, tables, shortcuts, status clarity
- Component priorities: navigation, search, panels, tables, command surfaces, empty states
- Avoid: landing-page-first composition inside core workflows, oversized cards, weak information density

## Analytics / BI / Exploration

- Default posture: exploration-led
- Common archetypes: operations surface, comparison grid
- Lean toward: strong hierarchy, filter-first layout, progressive disclosure, comparison support
- Component priorities: filters, summaries, charts, tables, annotations, drill-down surfaces
- Avoid: visual noise competing with data, unclear legends, hidden filters, overdone elevation

## Healthcare / Public Service

- Default posture: trust-led
- Common archetypes: guided utility, proof-led landing
- Lean toward: plain language, explicit help, readable spacing, strong accessibility, calm color system
- Component priorities: forms, step guidance, confirmations, help text, reminders, status surfaces
- Avoid: tiny targets, hidden instructions, stylized jargon, motion that obscures clarity

## Wellness / Hospitality / Premium Lifestyle

- Default posture: emotion-led
- Common archetypes: editorial story, proof-led landing
- Lean toward: warm pacing, refined typography, deliberate whitespace, soft but legible emphasis
- Component priorities: hero, testimonials, booking flow, image framing, cards, sectional rhythm
- Avoid: harsh chrome, dense enterprise tables, robotic microcopy, cold UI framing

## Marketplace / Pricing / Selection Flows

- Default posture: exploration-led or utility-led
- Common archetypes: comparison grid, guided utility
- Lean toward: side-by-side comparison, stable card systems, clear toggles, obvious next steps
- Component priorities: filters, cards, tables, pricing toggles, trust/proof modules, CTA hierarchy
- Avoid: inconsistent card geometry, CTA overload, missing comparison anchors, unstable sort behavior

## AI Product / Copilot / Automation Surface

- Default posture: workflow-led with selective trust-led cues
- Common archetypes: workflow demo, operations surface
- Lean toward: confidence states, explainability surfaces, restrained novelty, clear human override points
- Component priorities: input composer, result areas, source grounding, confidence/status, history, controls
- Avoid: generic cosmic gradients, fake anthropomorphic tone, hidden model behavior, unclear override paths
